case_title: LESLIE HARRIS VS. SOFI DIGITAL ASSETS LLC

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, LESLIE SERVED MAR-13-2023, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT SOFI DIGITAL ASSETS LLC

PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, LESLIE AS TO DEFENDANT SOFI DIGITAL ASSETS LLC SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-02-2023 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-01-2023 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-10-2023

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, LESLIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210030993) TO PLAINTIFF HARRIS, LESLIE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-02-2023 CONTINUED TO OCT-04-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-14-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-04-2023 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-14-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
